manage.Chinese:
用法：manage [-q/--quiet] [set/clean] [子选项] [值/子选项]
功能：系统配置管理与缓存/日志清理（无配置文件时自动创建默认值）
默认配置：
  debug-times = false（默认关闭命令耗时输出）
  debug-parsecmd = false（默认关闭命令解析调试）
  language = Chinese（默认中文界面）
  clean-log-time = 3（默认保留3天日志，自动清理过期）
  adv_danger_cmd_prompt = true（默认启用adv危险命令二次确认）
  mcp = true（默认启用MCP协议工具）
  mood = true（默认启用AI情感模块）
  spring-mode = true（默认启用启动问候语）
子命令：
  set  <选项> <值>    - 设置系统配置，支持：debug-times/debug-parsecmd/language/clean-log-time/adv_danger_cmd_prompt/sandbox/mcp/mood/spring-mode
  clean <选项> [子选项] - 清理缓存/日志，缓存子选项：path/cmdmap/dircache/toolindex/all；日志子选项：all/other
  -q/--quiet          - 静默模式，执行时不输出提示信息
适配系统：Windows/Linux/Termux全兼容
manage.English:
Usage: manage [-q/--quiet] [set/clean] [sub-option] [value/sub-option]
Function: System configuration management and cache/log cleaning (auto-create default config if not exists)
Default Config:
  debug-times = false (Disable command execution time output)
  debug-parsecmd = false (Disable full-process debugging)
  language = Chinese (Chinese interface by default)
  clean-log-time = 3 (Retain logs for 3 days, auto-clean expired)
  adv_danger_cmd_prompt = true (Enable adv dangerous cmd confirmation)
  mcp = true (Enable MCP protocol tools)
  mood = true (Enable AI mood module)
  spring-mode = true (Enable startup greetings)
Subcommands:
  set  <option> <value>    - Set config, options: debug-times/debug-parsecmd/language/clean-log-time/adv_danger_cmd_prompt/sandbox/mcp/mood/spring-mode
  clean <option> [sub-option] - Clean cache/log, cache: path/cmdmap/dircache/toolindex/all; log: all/other
  -q/--quiet          - Silent mode, no prompt output
Compatible systems: Windows/Linux/Termux
